data.title: Market Clubhouse Morning Memo - October 22nd, 2024 (Trade Strategy For SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META And TSLA)
data.description: Good Morning Traders! In today's Market Clubhouse Morning Memo, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

data.title: Quest Diagnostics CEO Touts 'New Customer Wins' In Q3, Expects Earnings Growth In 2025
data.description: Quest Diagnostics reports strong Q3 with 8.5% sales growth, raises 2024 revenue guidance to $9.80 billion-$9.85 billion, citing acquisitions and new customer wins.

data.title: Earnings Outlook For Thermo Fisher Scientific
Cryptocurrency Sui Falls More Than 4% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Sui's (CRYPTO: SUI) price has fallen 4.87% to $1.93. This continues its negative trend over the past week where it has experienced a 10.0% loss, moving from $2.09 to its current price.
